session_host_callbacks_t(3) Library Functions Manual session_host_callbacks_t(3)

NAME

session_host_callbacks_t - Callback function prototypes for session host events.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/common/session/host.h>

Data Fields


void(* on_client_join )(session_host_t *h, uint32_t client_id, void *user_data)
Called when a client joins the session. void(* on_client_leave )(session_host_t *h, uint32_t client_id, void *user_data)
Called when a client leaves the session. void(* on_frame_received )(session_host_t *h, uint32_t client_id, const image_t *frame, void *user_data)
Called when video frame received from a client. void(* on_audio_received )(session_host_t *h, uint32_t client_id, const float *samples, size_t count, void *user_data)
Called when audio samples received from a client. void(* on_error )(session_host_t *h, asciichat_error_t error, const char *message, void *user_data)
Called when an error occurs.

Detailed Description

Callback function prototypes for session host events.

Definition at line 104 of file host.h.

Field Documentation

void(* session_host_callbacks_t::on_audio_received) (session_host_t *h, uint32_t client_id, const float *samples, size_t count, void *user_data)

Called when audio samples received from a client.

Parameters

h Host handle
client_id Source client's ID
samples Audio sample buffer (float format)
count Number of samples
user_data User-provided context pointer

Definition at line 138 of file host.h.

void(* session_host_callbacks_t::on_client_join) (session_host_t *h, uint32_t client_id, void *user_data)

Called when a client joins the session.

Parameters

h Host handle
client_id New client's ID
user_data User-provided context pointer

Definition at line 111 of file host.h.

Referenced by session_host_add_client(), and session_host_add_memory_participant().

void(* session_host_callbacks_t::on_client_leave) (session_host_t *h, uint32_t client_id, void *user_data)

Called when a client leaves the session.

Parameters

h Host handle
client_id Departing client's ID
user_data User-provided context pointer

Definition at line 119 of file host.h.

Referenced by session_host_remove_client(), and session_host_stop().

void(* session_host_callbacks_t::on_error) (session_host_t *h, asciichat_error_t error, const char *message, void *user_data)

Called when an error occurs.

Parameters

h Host handle
error Error code
message Error message
user_data User-provided context pointer

Definition at line 147 of file host.h.

Referenced by session_host_start().

void(* session_host_callbacks_t::on_frame_received) (session_host_t *h, uint32_t client_id, const image_t *frame, void *user_data)

Called when video frame received from a client.

Parameters

h Host handle
client_id Source client's ID
frame Video frame image
user_data User-provided context pointer
